name: Salmon in Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tbsp. butter in a skillet at 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cook the salmon for 10 minutes per inch of thickness, turning it twice to ensure even cooking. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. When the salmon is done, remove it to a hot platter.
4. In the same skillet, combine the remaining sour cream and dill. Turn off the heat.
5. Allow the mixture to warm for a few minutes until the sour cream is heated through.
6. Pour the warmed sour cream over the salmon and serve with new potatoes, green beans, and fruit salad.
